items.name: readme-badge
items.title: Readme Badge
items.description: Renders a shieldcn badge image with optional link wrapping. Works with any badge URL — shieldcn, shields.io, or custom images.

items.name: readme-badge-row
items.title: Readme Badge Row
items.description: Horizontal layout wrapper for multiple badges with consistent spacing, wrapping, and alignment. Pairs with ReadmeBadge.

items.name: badge-preview
items.title: Badge Preview
items.description: Visual badge preview with live image rendering and optional copyable code snippet. Ideal for documentation pages, badge builders, and app UIs.
